design_philosophy: Clean, highly legible, physical/tactile interface. Big touch targets designed for gloved or fast-moving hands. High contrast layout minimizing eye strain under daylight.

colors.primary_description: Petrol Green - Trustworthy, used for primary actions, active states, and successful flow steps.
colors.secondary_description: Fuel Orange - Warm accent for warnings, partial states, or secondary actions.
colors.accent_red_description: Signal Red - For cancellation, errors, offline pumps.

layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: Minimum 64px height for main buttons and keypad keys. (Critical for POS usability)
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements and buttons

Keypad.keys: Massive 80px tall touch areas. bg-slate-100 active:bg-slate-200. No borders.
Keypad.action_keys: Clear (C) in red tint, Enter (ОК) in Petrol Green.

PumpTile.layout: Flex column, p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 transition-all

states.free: border-slate-200. Status badge: Сул (Green bg, White text)
states.in_use: border-orange-500 shadow-lg. Status badge: Түгээж байна (Orange bg)
states.offline: border-red-200 opacity-70. Status badge: Ажиллахгүй (Red bg)

BottomTab.layout: Flex row, justify-around, fixed bottom, bg-white border-t border-slate-200 pb-safe pt-2

Header.content: Operator Name, Current Shift Time, Network/Printer Status Indicators

elements: PIN Dots Display: 4-6 large dots, filled/unfilled state
Background image overlaid with white/90 for clean look

2_Dashboard.layout: Standard layout with Header, Scrollable Grid, BottomTab
elements: Quick Stats row above grid: Өнөөдрийн борлуулалт (Today's Sales)

3_New_Sale_Flow.layout: Wizard style with large prominent steps. Split screen on tablet (Left: Flow, Right: Summary cart)

steps.name: Fuel Type
steps.UI: Large buttons for АИ-92, АИ-95, Дизель. Color coded.

steps.name: Amount/Liters
steps.UI: Toggle between Дүн (MNT) and Литр (L). Big Number display + Keypad below.

steps.name: Payment Method
steps.UI: 3 massive cards: Бэлэн (Cash), Карт (Card), Гишүүний карт (Membership)

elements: Result Card: Shows Member Name, Үлдэгдэл (Balance)
Action: Төлөх (Pay & Deduct) large Petrol Green button
Type Selector: Хувь хүн (Individual) vs Байгууллага (Organization) toggle
Input: Регистрийн дугаар (Register number) via keypad (alphanumeric support if needed, but numeric primary for orgs)

6_Receipt_Preview.layout: Receipt paper styling (bg-white, shadow-sm, monospace text alignment)

backgrounds.description: Bright gas station, use with heavy white overlay (bg-white/90) for Login screen background.

placeholders.description: Close up of gas pump nozzle for empty states or header branding.
Minimal white paper texture for receipt background or success state.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on Petrol Green (#0F766E) passes WCAG AA.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute for robust automated testing. Example: data-testid='login-pin-button', data-testid='pump-tile-1', data-testid='pay-cash-button'.
